prompt: A casual smartphone photo in a home office or gaming desk setup, shot vertically from a first-person perspective. A left hand in the foreground is holding a black ceramic mug with partial white logo text, and the mug is absurdly filled to the brim with thick chicken tikka masala instead of a drink. The curry is rich orange-red, creamy, with 3 visible chunks of chicken, a white yogurt swirl on top, and a small garnish of fresh cilantro leaves centered on the surface. The mug is positioned near the center-left of the frame above a medium-brown wooden desk. In the background, show a realistic desk scene: 1 black articulated desk lamp on the left, 1 black wall light switch on an off-white wall, visible white radiator pipes and a radiator, 1 red audio interface with knobs and cables near the back of the desk, 1 white game controller behind the mug, 1 computer monitor on the right edge showing a messaging app interface, several loose cables on the desk, and 1 large dark desk mat with a subtle red ornamental pattern in the lower right. Use warm late-afternoon indoor lighting with soft shadows, slight wide-angle phone camera distortion, shallow depth from the close foreground hand and mug, and a humorous but highly photorealistic everyday snapshot aesthetic.
